CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answer To Special Interrogatory No. 1 And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant CORNERSTONE TITLE COMPANY's Motion to Compel Answer to Special Interrogatory No. 1 and for Sanctions is off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca L. Woodson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
